name: jylhis-skills-core
description: Default Jylhis skills bundle: cross-cutting security review, ast-grep structural search, and offline documentation lookup. Ships the @reviewer / @explorer / @debugger subagents plus plugin-local skills invocable as /jylhis-skills-core:explore, /jylhis-skills-core:lsp-status, and /jylhis-skills-core:remember-correction.
